Fields.Name: Posture Additive Animation ID: Two-Hand
Fields.Description: The additive animation ID applied to the current animation when this weapon is two-handed.

Fields.Name: Posture Additive Animation ID: Right-Hand
Fields.Description: The additive animation ID applied to the current animation when this weapon is right-handed.

Fields.Name: Posture Additive Animation ID: Left-Hand
Fields.Description: The additive animation ID applied to the current animation when this weapon is left-handed.

Fields.Name: Change Weapon ID
Fields.Description: The weapon ID to use when changing weapons whilst this weapon is the primary.

Fields.Name: LookAt ID
Fields.Description: The LookAt param ID to use.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: 1 (when Destroyed)
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to play when the weapon is destroyed.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: 2 (when Destroyed)
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to play when the weapon is destroyed.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: 3 (when Destroyed)
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to play when the weapon is destroyed.

Fields.Name: Particle 1: Dummy Polygon (when Destroyed)
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID that generates the particle upon the weapon being destoryed. -1 means no particle is generated.

Fields.Name: Particle 2: Dummy Polygon (when Destroyed)
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID that generates the particle upon the weapon being destoryed. -1 means no particle is generated.

Fields.Name: Particle 3: Dummy Polygon (when Destroyed)
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID that generates the particle upon the weapon being destoryed. -1 means no particle is generated.

Fields.Name: LookAt Direction Type
Fields.Description: Direction to point with LookAt

Fields.Name: Bullet Shoot Direction Type
Fields.Description: The direction to fire bullets in

Fields.Name: Default Behavior Judgement ID
Fields.Description: ChrBehavior control program: If 'Use behavior judgment ID' is not checked for shooting, shoot using the set behavior judgment ID

Fields.Name: Ammunition: Total Rounds
Fields.Description: Total number of rounds that can be fired. -1 means infinite.

Fields.Name: Shield ID
Fields.Description: The shield param ID to use when guarding with this weapon. -1 means the weapon's guard parameters are used.

Fields.Name: Lock Distance
Fields.Description: The lock distance of the weapon. In metres.

Fields.Name: Melee Specialization
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of angular velocity correction.

Fields.Name: Lock Vertical %
Fields.Description: The vertical scale of the lock-on.

Fields.Name: Lock Width %
Fields.Description: The width scale of the lock-on.

Fields.Name: Lock Time
Fields.Description: The time to lock-on. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing ID
Fields.Description: The blade homing parameters to use for this weapon.

Fields.Name: Assembly Menu Category
Fields.Description: The assembly menu category for this part.

Fields.Name: Weapon Hold Type: Right
Fields.Description: The weapon hold type in the right-hand.

Fields.Name: Weapon Hold Type: Left
Fields.Description: The weapon hold type in the left-hand.

Fields.Name: HUD Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon ID for the the weapon panel GUI.

Fields.Name: Weapon: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The energy consumption of this weapon.

Fields.Name: Category Name ID
Fields.Description: The text that appears for this category.

Fields.Name: Pair-equipped Weapon ID
Fields.Description: The weapon ID to use if two of these weapons are equipped.

Fields.Name: Operation Permission Type ID
Fields.Description: The operation permissions for this weapon.

Fields.Name: Weapon: Ammunition Cost
Fields.Description: Cost per round fired. At the end of each mission, the total number of rounds fired is used to calculate ammunition expenses.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor - Guard Absorption %: Depleted Uranium
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when this weapon is guarding with pulse armor.

Fields.Name: Weapon Attachment ID
Fields.Description: The ID of the attachment joint to use for this weapon.
